title: Hermes Agent Self-Evolution Cover
brief: A WeChat article cover image for a technical deep-dive titled about Hermes Agent self-evolution principles. Hermes Agent is an open-source AI agent framework by Nous Research. Its branding: retro-futuristic pixel art aesthetic with warm yellow/gold/terracotta gradient colors, black background, circuit-board trace outlines like wireframes, geometric precision, no curves. The Greek god Hermes is represented by the caduceus symbol (a herald staff with two intertwined serpents) — this should appear as a subtle central motif. The concept of 'self-evolution' should be expressed geometrically: branching paths, layered accumulation, recursive loops, like a system that grows and learns from itself. Composition: centered, bold, restrained, not cluttered. Leave generous negative space at top for overlaid title text (WeChat headline cover 2.35:1 crop). Atmosphere: thoughtful, precise, warm — not cold corporate tech, not dark cyberpunk.
prompt:
Create an illustration titled 'Hermes Agent Self-Evolution Cover'. Style: contemporary editorial illustration, layered composition, subtle texture, restrained color palette, atmospheric but concrete, article-friendly visual metaphor, no text labels, no diagrams, no arrows. This is for an article or essay — not a technical document. Do NOT add any diagrams, arrows, labels, callouts, or text. Focus on a concrete visual idea with atmosphere, restraint, and editorial clarity. This is a WeChat Official Account headline cover image (公众号头条封面). Compose for a 2.35:1 ultra-wide crop (1080x460). Keep key subjects centered or in the bottom third — top area will be cropped. Design for readability as a small thumbnail in WeChat's subscription feed. Title text will be overlaid by the editor, so leave ample negative space. Language/region: zh. Target aspect ratio: wechat-cover-hd. Mode: text-only. Brief:
